name: Twilio
description: Send SMS, WhatsApp messages, and make calls via the Twilio API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Twilio API action to perform.

to.label: To
to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format. Used by: Send SMS, Send WhatsApp, Make Call.

from.label: From
from.description: Twilio phone number in E.164 format. Used by: Send SMS, Send WhatsApp, Make Call.

body.label: Body
body.description: Message body. Used by: Send SMS, Send WhatsApp.

statusCallbackUrl.label: Status Callback URL
statusCallbackUrl.description: URL for delivery status webhooks. Used by: Send SMS, Send WhatsApp.

messageSid.label: Message SID
messageSid.description: Twilio message SID. Used by: Get Message Status.

twiml.label: TwiML
twiml.description: TwiML instructions for the call. Used by: Make Call.
